# Najmush Saaquib

> Senior Backend Engineer based in Bangalore, India. Specialising in distributed systems, microservices, event-driven architecture, and scalable APIs.

## About

Najmush Saaquib is a senior Java/Node.js engineer who builds high-throughput backend systems. He writes about engineering craft, system design, and tools he builds along the way.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://najmushsaaquib.com — portfolio with experience, projects, skills, and contact
- Blog: https://najmushsaaquib.com/blog — technical writing on backend engineering and software craft
- Projects: https://najmushsaaquib.com/projects — side projects and open-source work
- BookShelf: https://najmushsaaquib.com/bookshelf — books currently reading and recommended

## Blog Posts

- [I Built a Chrome Extension in a Weekend. Here's Exactly How You Can Too.](https://najmushsaaquib.com/blog/how-to-build-a-chrome-extension)
- [How to Publish a Chrome Extension to the Chrome Web Store](https://najmushsaaquib.com/blog/how-to-publish-chrome-extension)
